content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Copy the decision table entries into table `J09B_temp` where the tour starts with `J09B`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `J09B_temp`.

3. Classify the meter reading type in `ENTSCHEIDUNG`:
   - if a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`, set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "KSA"`
   - else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`

4. JOIN the table with `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. JOIN the table with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer sales master data and net master data.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   1. Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   1. Use the net data customer table entries.

8. Export the final table data as CSV file named `J09B`. Use exactly these column names:
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`

9. Send an email to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the CSV file attached.
   - file_path: `<path_to_exported_csv_file>`

10. Delete the temporary table.

11. End the process."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy the decision table entries into table `J09B_temp` where the tour starts with `J09B`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `J09B_temp`.

3. Classify the meter reading type in `ENTSCHEIDUNG`:
   - if a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`, set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "KSA"`
   - else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`

4. JOIN the table with `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. JOIN the table with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer sales master data and net master data.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   1. Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   1. Use the net data customer table entries.

8. Export the final table data as CSV file named `J09B`. Use exactly these column names:
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`

9. Send an email to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the CSV file attached.
   - file_path: `<path_to_exported_csv_file>`

10. Delete the temporary table.

11. End the process.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp; CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.EQUNR) FROM J09B_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END;

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.EQUNR) FROM J09B_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

args.sql_query: SELECT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", t.HAUS AS HAUS, t.ANLAGE AS ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID AS ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR AS EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1 AS HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS CITY1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS CITY2, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = t.ANLAGE LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON sm.EQUNR = t.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON nm.EQUNR = t.EQUNR
